detailed_description: The video provides a concise visual introduction to two skincare products from Quia Korean Beauty: the Collagen Niacinamide Jelly Cream and the Collagen Night Wrapping Mask. It features close-up shots of both product containers, showcasing their elegant pink packaging. The core value lies in the explicit demonstration of the products' unique textures; a spatula is used to scoop and stir the translucent, jelly-like cream, while the mask is squeezed from its tube, revealing its clear, viscous consistency. The video emphasizes the aesthetic and tactile qualities of the skincare line.

segments.why_kept: This segment acts as the primary anchor, introducing both products and immediately demonstrating their key feature: texture and consistency, through direct product interaction (scooping the cream, squeezing the mask). It sets the visual theme and highlights the core products.

This segment complements the anchor by providing additional visual reinforcement of both products and their textures. It includes more product standalone shots and further close-up interactions (stirring the jelly cream), solidifying the impression of the products' quality and consistency.
